violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed tape on chest freezer. Tape is not a cleanable surface.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracked tile in food prep area.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Observed boxes of food on floor of both walk in freezers.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Observed boxes of single service items on floor in pantry area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed trash on floor of walk in freezer by office.
